prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FIRESTARTER-2PC Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Magnesium Fire Starter and Striker Camping Essential Survival Tool Description: The ASR Outdoor fire starter tool set comes with a magnesium firestarter and a striker which will allow you to create a heat source while you're camping, hiking, or find yourself in an emergency survival situation.

The striker included with this fire starter kit features a serrated blade, which was designed to gently shave a small quantity of the magnesium into tinder. Once you have the magnesium, simply strike the magnesium with the striker to create a spark. Let the sparks fall onto the shaved magnesium to start a fire.

The magnesium fire starter rod features an ergonomic grip handle to prevent slippage during use, ensuring that you don't injure yourself while starting a fire. The fire starter kit comes with a nylon lanyard so you can easily attach it to your backpack, belt, or other camping and hiking gear for quick deployment when needed. It only weighs .05lbs (.8oz) so it won't add much weight or bulk to your gear. Search Terms: fire starter fire starter survival tool flint fire starter fire starter kit firestarter camping accessories camping gear camping stove camping supplies camping grill survival gear survival kits survival gear and equipment fire starter survival tool Features: - 2PC FIRE STARTER TOOL SET - The ASR Outdoor fire starter tool set comes with a magnesium firestarter and a striker which will allow you to create a heat source while you're camping, hiking, or find yourself in an emergency survival situation. - SERRATED STRIKER - The striker included with this fire starter kit features a serrated blade, which was designed to gently shave a small quantity of the magnesium into tinder. Once you have the magnesium, simply strike the magnesium with the striker to create a spark. Let the sparks fall onto the shaved magnesium to start a fire. - EASY GRIP HANDLE - The magnesium fire starter rod features an ergonomic grip handle to prevent slippage during use, ensuring that you don't injure yourself while starting a fire. - COMES WITH LANYARD - The fire starter kit comes with a nylon lanyard so you can easily attach it to your backpack, belt or other camping and hiking gear for quick deployment when needed. It only weighs .05lbs (.8oz) so it won't add much weight or bulk to your gear. - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: magnesium, steel, plastic, nylon; Colors: black, green; Magnesium rod dimensions: 2" length, 3/16" diameter; Striker blade type: serrated === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Magnesium Fire Starter with Striker

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Magnesium Fire Starter and Striker

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2-Piece Kit, Serrated Striker Blade, Ergonomic Grip, Nylon Lanyard, Lightweight Survival Tool

openai.title_differentiation: Serrated Steel Striker, Ergonomic Grip Handle, Nylon Lanyard, Ultra Light, Camping And Survival Use
